News

Work Mar 25, 2026

Poetry Magazine

Andrea Trabucco-Campos and team create custom typographic lettering and cover designs for the oldest poetry monthly publication in the English-speaking world.

Work Mar 25, 2026

Bait

Luke Powell, Jody Hudson-Powell and team design the title sequence and location cards for Riz Ahmed’s ‘Bait’, mirroring the show’s exploration of ever-shifting internal and external identities, validation and perception.

Marina Willer at Nicer Tuesdays

Andrea Trabucco-Campos at DeHache 26

About

Pentagram is the world’s most acclaimed creative collective, where 23 partners work independently and collaboratively to shape the future of design. Guided by curiosity and intellect, we create work that redefines ideas, shifts perceptions, and leaves an imprint across disciplines and industries.
